summary: v0.6.12 release candidate remains acceptable after the bun.lock review fix. The lockfile now matches package workspace metadata at 0.6.12, frozen lockfile install passes, release:check passes, and the prior heavy candidate gates still establish release readiness subject to fresh hosted checks on the latest branch head.
findings: Resolved PR #4306 review thread by syncing root bun.lock metadata for agentplane, @agentplaneorg/core, @agentplaneorg/recipes, and @agentplane/testkit dependency references to 0.6.12.
residual_risks: Need fresh hosted PR checks on commit 76081ab34 or later before integration.
